texto: I come from - I came from Wales, and it's a strong, butch society. We were in the war and all that. People didn't waste time feeling sorry for themselves. You had to get on with it. So my credo is get on with it. I don't waste time being soft. I'm not cold, but I don't like being, wasting my time with - life's too short.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Anthony Hopkins: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes.
